ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the quest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the quest takes place */,
  "given_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who gives the quest */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward associated with the quest */,
  "form_id" TEXT /* Form ID of the quest */,
  "editor_id" TEXT /* Editor ID of the quest */,
  "quest_type" TEXT /* Type of quest (e.g., main, side, optional) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of prerequisite quest IDs */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of objectives to complete the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_given_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("given_by_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location (e.g., x, y, z) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location (e.g., desert, forest, tundra) */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain of the location (e.g., mountainous, flat, hilly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Attributes of the character (e.g., strength, intelligence) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "faction" TEXT /* Faction the character belongs to */,
  "relationships" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of relationships with other characters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., item, currency, experience) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quest_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite quest */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., hard, soft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_dependencies_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_dependencies_prerequisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of the character in the quest */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the quest was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progress_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progress_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_saves" (
  "save_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game save */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "save_date" TEXT /* Date the game was saved */,
  "save_slot" INTEGER /* Save slot number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("save_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_saves_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_saves_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., quest completion, character conversation) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., strength, intelligence) */,
  "attribute_value" INTEGER /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_attributes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "related_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related character */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, enemy, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_related_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quest_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each objective */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "objective_name" TEXT /* Name of the objective */,
  "objective_description" TEXT /* Description of the objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_objectives_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quest_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "prerequisite_quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_prerequisites_prerequisite_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_prerequisites_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)
